SUPPLY SERVICES AGREEMENT

between Crestline Office Supplies ("Vendor") and Customer Corp. ("Customer")
Effective Date: January 1, 2023

1. SERVICES
1.1 Vendor shall supply Customer with office supply kits on a recurring
subscription basis, plus ad hoc supply kit orders as requested by Customer.

2. TERM AND RENEWAL
2.1 This Agreement shall automatically renew annually unless Customer
provides written notice of non-renewal at least twenty (20) days before
the renewal date.

3. CUSTOMER OBLIGATIONS
3.1 Customer shall submit monthly supply kit order counts through Vendor's
ordering portal.

4. FEES AND PAYMENT
4.1 Customer shall pay a monthly subscription base fee of $250.00.
4.2 Each supply kit ordered shall be billed at $12.00 per kit.
4.3 Invoices are issued monthly and due within thirty (30) days.
4.4 Customer shall pay an annual contract administration fee of $150.00,
invoiced each January.

5. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
5.1 Neither party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall exceed
the fees paid by Customer in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

6. GOVERNING LAW
6.1 This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Ohio.
